subject: Launch Bonus Gone When Livestream Ends
body:
I just revealed the greatest offer I've ever made…

Here's what you get when you get 200+ copies of Money Models:

The ACQ Implementation Virtual Workshop led entirely by me based on the exact workshop we do in-person for $35,000 - I will be answering your questions while taking you through my…

- Proprietary ACQ Deconstraining Process where I personally guide you step-by-step through our entire deconstraining process to help you laser-focus on the one thing holding back your 10x growth.

- Supply & Demand Amplification to reveal whether your bottleneck is demand generation or supply optimization.

- Find & Create Leverage Framework by identifying exact constraints to get you maximum returns on your effort… and my highest leverage frameworks to help you realize as much of it as you can.

- Crystal Clear Personalized Implementation Plan showing you exactly the constraint to annihilate first and my best tactics for doing it so you can leverage the most 10x growth you can.

PLUS…

- 12 ACQ Playbooks - My most detailed deep dive into all the profit-boosting business tactics we use at Aquisition.com. THESE ARE PHYSICAL COPIES ONLY.

- Closing Handbook - (64 pages) of my favorite overcomes for each sales objection…that actually work.
- Proof Checklist - (32 pages) + a one-page checklist on how I weave in 14 proof elements into every offer.
- Retention Playbook - (42 pages) on specific steps we take to activate customers to keep them paying and kill your churn.
- Marketing Machine - (32 pages) on how to set up your business so that every customer creates enough media - automatically - that your business can market itself.
- Lifetime Value - (32 pages) on all the eight different ways that I look at increasing how much customers pay.
- Hooks Playbook - (30 pages) of my top creative hooks for organic, paid, and email.
- Branding Playbook - (42 pages) - the quick and dirty "how to build a brand" playbook for entrepreneurs who need one fast.
- Price Raise Playbook - (32 pages) - the actual letters, emails, and scripts we use to raise prices on existing customers and keep them.
- Promo Cash Playbook - (36 pages) - these are the promos we use around the year to generate cash from our existing audience/list.
- GOATed Ads - (36 pages) - my paid ads process explained in gritty detail.
- Lead Nurture - (46 pages) - If you get more people to show up to sales events, you will sell more people. This is everything I know about increasing show up rates.

PLUS…

My Custom Trained ACQ AI where I integrated my entire life's work - over $28,000,000 of real-world consulting, all my books, all twelve advanced playbooks, and my never-before-released writings to train a custom AI that…

- Finally Answers "What Would Alex Do In My Business?"
- Puts $28M of Real-World Consulting At Your Fingertips
- Your $135,000 Answer Fine-Tuned In An Instant
- Engineers Hyper-Relevant Solutions for 226+ unique businesses
- Like Having My ACQ Killers On-Call for you 24/7
- Grants Access To The "De-Classified" ACQ Data Vault.

YOUR TIME TO GET THE LAUNCH COLLATERAL BLACKBOOK EXPIRES SOON

My Entire Launch Blackbook (200+ pages) FREE with all the emails, texts, ads, video sales letters, the presentation itself, the agenda…everything we used to promote this launch that you can use to launch anything you want.

This Goes Away the Moment Live Stream Ends.

Here's the easiest way to make this decision:

If my stuff has made you the amount of money to cover the purchase, do it.

If it hasn't, no sweat.

All these are Free when you buy 200 copies of Money Models

Never. Have I ever. Regretted. Learning more skills,

Alex

PS - Go here before the offer ends. Grab the books and claim your insane bonuses here.

PPS - For big business owners: who want to work with me for free for six months → Look for the one-time 800 copy offer after you buy 200 copies.
